other.description: While a friendly **^^T’au Empire^^** unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

other.description: Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

other.description: While a friendly **^^T’au Empire^^** unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time you select that unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

other.name: Suppression Volley
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

other.description: At the start of your opponent’s Charge phase, you can select one enemy unit (excluding **^^Monster^^** and **^^Vehicle^^** units) within 12" of this unit. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test and, until the end of the turn, subtract 1 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

other.name: Exemplars of Mont’ka
other.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, that attack has the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** and **[IGNORES COVER]** abilities.

other.name: Retro-thrusters
other.description: At the end of the Fight phase, this unit can either make a Normal move of up to 6" or a Fall Back move.
